'''Verpine zal alloy mesh''' was a type of [[Armor/Legends|armor]] that was manufactured by the [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] during the years before and after the [[Jedi Civil War]]. The armor offered outstanding protection against most types of attacks due to its utilization of [[Zal alloy]], however, this also increased the price of the armor immensely.

==Behind the scenes==
This armor can be acquired in the game ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' on the planet [[Lehon/Legends|Lehon]] as a reward from the [[Black Rakata]] war leader outside the settlement for killing the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] Hunters near the [[Temple of the Ancients]].

It is also possible to randomly acquire this armor in ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''.
